response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and polyglot development experience with a focus on testability and developer tooling, but his background lacks direct experience with enterprise JVM tooling, IDE development, or deep Spring/Kotlin ecosystems. His open-source contributions and tooling projects show technical curiosity, but the role requires specialized expertise in IDE internals and enterprise Java frameworks.
strengths: Extensive experience with developer tooling and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Proven ability to design and maintain complex systems (e.g., Stripe, Shopify, Datadog).
Strong polyglot skills with a focus on testability and clean architecture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
concerns: No direct experience with IDE development or JVM tooling (e.g., IntelliJ, Eclipse, or language servers).
Limited exposure to enterprise Java/Kotlin ecosystems (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) in recent roles.
Most recent work is full-stack (TypeScript/Node.js), with no evidence of deep JVM or build-tool integration experience.
